Subject: Dinner 4/5
Message:
Hi Everyone - Please plan on coming over to Chez Lindberg for dinner on Friday, April 5 at 6:30 pm.  
Spouses and/or significant others welcome.
Directions:

I - 10 West to Blalock/Echo Lane exit.

Make a U - turn, (you'll be heading east on the feeder now)

Turn right on Piney Point (between the Just Brakes Shop and the Tall Plant Shop)

Turn right on South Chestwood.

3rd house on the right. 

11410 South Chestwood
713-827-8760

We are looking forward to seeing everyone!  Ciao.

Lorraine
